mapper.subject: How was your experience with us!

contents.text:
Hi {{4.`0`}}

Thank you so much for choosing Climb Automation on{{4.`4`}}!
We truly appreciate your business.

We'd love to hear about your experience. Could you take 60 seconds
to leave us a Google review? Your feedback helps us grow and helps
other customers find us.

  [ ⭐ Leave a Google Review ]  ← button linking to review URL

It only takes a moment and means the world to us!

Warm regards,
The Climb Automation Team

expect.name: useColumnHeaders
expect.label: Use column headers as IDs of the columns

mapper.body:
Hi {{4.`0`}}{{4.`0`}}! 👋 Thanks for visiting [Business Name]. We'd love your 
feedback — could you leave us a quick Google review? It only takes 
a minute! 👉 [REVIEW LINK] Reply STOP to opt out.
